title: UGEARS Hogwarts Castle Harry Potter 3D Puzzle - 3D Wooden Model Kits for Adults to Build - Building Kit Hobbies for Men, Wood Brain Teaser Games DIY Set, 3D Wooden Puzzles for Adults
features: Officially Licensed: Authentic recreation of the iconic Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry as seen in the beloved film series with detailed towers, stonework in 3D wooden puzzles for adults
Intricate Design Harry Potter Puzzle for Adults: Wooden models showing interior details like the Great Hall, plus interactive elements including a moving staircase and dragon with articulated wings
Premium Quality: Harry Potter wooden puzzle games for adults made from high-quality composite wood with precision laser-cut parts that fit together perfectly without requiring glue or special tools
Engaging Building Experience: 3D puzzles adult model building rated "Medium" difficulty level with 340 pcs and approx. 6 hours of assembly time, complete with illustrated instructions in 11 languages

Perfect DIY Kit Gift: Ideal Harry Potter model kits present for adults on Birthday, Christmas or Fathers Day - rewards young readers while providing a memorable building experience; hobbies for adults men

Press parts from the side with thicker cut lines when removing them from pre-cut boards Check and sand gears for burrs to prevent jamming Wax all moving parts for smoother operation Stretch rubber bands to fit them into small openings Do I need any tools to assemble Ugears models? Everything needed for assembly is in the box Ugears models don’t need extra tools or glue If you prefer, you can use your own tools A modeling knife can help with removing pieces or smoothing, but we provide punch pieces and sandpaper for these tasks Spare and replacement parts for Ugears mechanical models Spare parts are included for components used multiple times. If you break any unique pieces, you can request free replacements, and we’ll send them to you at no cost. What if I have more questions about assembling the models? You can check out the video instructions above If you have any questions, feel free to reach out via email The Ugears Service Team will be happy to provide tips, explanations, troubleshooting, or other help with the assembly MORE UGEARS MODELS Windstorm Dragon Add To Basket Aero Clock Add To Basket NASA Saturn V Add To Basket Book of Secrets Add To Basket Mechanical Tellurion Add To Basket Sky Watcher Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,330 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,464 4.4 out of 5 stars 657 4.6 out of 5 stars 179 4.4 out of 5 stars 462 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,242 Price £47.99 £ 47 . 99 £74.50 £ 74 . 50 £64.99 £ 64 . 99 £56.99 £ 56 . 99 £46.50 £ 46 . 50 £74.11 £ 74 . 11 Skill level Medium Advanced Advanced Medium Medium Advanced Parts 320 320 315 263 249 338 Assembly time 6 hours 11 hours 7 hours 9 hours 5 hours 15 hours Mechanic ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Model size 53х48,5х29 cm 75x47x16.5 cm 10х66,5х14,6 cm 17x18,7x7 cm 40,5х26х30,5 cm 30.5x18x16.5 cm
